---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="about-hero">
<div class="about-photo-wrap">
<div class="about-photo-halo"></div>
<img src="images/profile.jpg" onerror="this.src='images/profile-placeholder.svg'" class="about-photo" alt="Prerna Tyagi">
</div>
<div class="about-intro">
<p class="section-crumb">~/about/</p>
<h1 class="about-name">Prerna Tyagi</h1>
<p class="about-tagline">Gradient Descending Statistician. <strong>Decoding AI/ML by applying it</strong> — shipping first, studying why it worked second.</p>
<p class="about-bio">Statistics background. Started shipping real things before I felt ready — backpropagation, for my career — and writing about each one as I go.</p>
<div class="about-links">
<a href="https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="GitHub"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8z"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/prerna-tyagi-/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="LinkedIn"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M0 1.146C0 .513.526 0 1.175 0h13.65C15.474 0 16 .513 16 1.146v13.708c0 .633-.526 1.146-1.175 1.146H1.175C.526 16 0 15.487 0 14.854V1.146zm4.943 12.248V6.169H2.542v7.225h2.401zm-1.2-8.212c.837 0 1.358-.554 1.358-1.248-.015-.709-.52-1.248-1.342-1.248-.822 0-1.359.54-1.359 1.248 0 .694.521 1.248 1.327 1.248h.016zm4.908 8.212V9.359c0-.216.016-.432.08-.586.173-.431.568-.878 1.232-.878.869 0 1.216.662 1.216 1.634v3.865h2.401V9.25c0-2.22-1.184-3.252-2.764-3.252-1.274 0-1.845.7-2.165 1.193v.025h-.016a5.54 5.54 0 0 1 .016-.025V6.169h-2.4c.03.678 0 7.225 0 7.225h2.4z"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://x.com/prernaaa0808" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="X / Twitter"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12.6.75h2.454l-5.36 6.142L16 15.25h-4.937l-3.867-5.07-4.425 5.07H.316l5.733-6.57L0 .75h5.063l3.495 4.633L12.601.75Zm-.86 13.028h1.36L4.323 2.145H2.865z"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://www.kaggle.com/prena0808" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Kaggle"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M18.825 23.859c-.022.092-.117.141-.281.141h-3.139c-.187 0-.351-.082-.492-.248l-5.178-6.589-1.448 1.374v5.111c0 .235-.117.352-.351.352H5.505c-.236 0-.354-.117-.354-.352V.353c0-.233.118-.353.354-.353h2.431c.234 0 .351.12.351.353v14.343l6.203-6.272c.165-.165.33-.246.495-.246h3.239c.144 0 .236.06.285.18.046.149.034.255-.036.315l-6.555 6.344 6.836 8.507c.095.104.117.208.07.358"/></svg></a>
</div>
</div>
</div>
```

## The work

I build AI/ML products end-to-end: problem framing, model development, API contracts, deployment, monitoring, and experimentation. The portfolio breaks into three lanes:

- **Shipped product** — [Pragya Nursery](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/pragya-nursery-platform), a real e-commerce platform live for my father's plant nursery in Greater Noida. Vercel + Render + Capacitor + Paytm.
- **Applied case studies** — [Credit Risk Studio](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/credit-risk-studio), [Fraud Detection Monitor](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fraud-detection-monitor), [Personalized Marketplace Search](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/fintech-github-showcase/tree/main/personalized-marketplace-search), and others — each built with production discipline rather than notebook polish.
- **This blog** — implementing the building blocks of modern AI from scratch, paired with companion notebooks in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth).

## Currently learning in public

A long-form series on what's actually inside the production AI stack — embeddings, attention, tokenization, retrieval, fine-tuning, agents. Each post takes weeks because every claim is paired with running from-scratch code and measured experiments. Read it in [Building Blocks of Modern AI](index.qmd).

## Reach out

Email best for substantive things. DMs open on [X](https://x.com/prernaaa0808) and [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/prerna-tyagi-/) for short threads. GitHub for code.
